text: Shredded beef beaten until tender, then cooked with scrambled eggs, tomato, and chile. Savory, spicy, and satisfying — a breakfast staple with serious character.
A hearty dumpling made from masa, beans, cheese, and dried meat. Steamed and served with salsa, it’s a rustic dish born in the nearby community of Pedernales.
Creamy avocado ice cream with a subtle sweetness and smooth texture. A local specialty that surprises and delights — perfect for warm afternoons in the plaza.
